violations.text: The mechanical dish washer located in the kitchen area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026
The ceiling tile above the register in the cafeteria area is poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2026

The food storage closet in the kitchen area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings. Establishment is to use appropriate means of cleaning and sanitizing. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 04/02/2025

The floor in the dry storage area has an accumulation of soil residue, droppings and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Establishment is to clean and sanitize any and all droppings. Establishment is to continue to work with pest control to eliminate rodent activity. New Violation. Correct By: 04/26/2025

The Dishwasher located by the three bay was not in good repair. The two door Traulsen Freezer was not in good repair. Kitchen equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2024
The floor around drain in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the kitchen area such as dishwasher unit. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2024
The floor tiles around drain in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2023
The floor in the dry storage area has an accumulation of soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2023
The floor around drain in the kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2023
